findings.issue: Blocker #15 status is false. Partial Open Badges 3.0 VC implementation exists in `packages/badge_issuer/open_badges_3_0_vc.py` and `src/credentials/openbadges/v3/schema.ts`, contradicting blockers doc claim of 'ready to build'. Unverified claims in audit docs create false risk exposure.
findings.recommended_fix: Update PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md to 🟡 partial. Verify all 19 blockers against code-index before asserting status. Implement CI check that rejects unverified blocker status updates.

whistleblower_flag: Blocker tracking is operating on fiction, not code. This is a launch-critical governance failure.
